Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/In-Person_Events.asp

# SBDC In-Person Events Catalog

## Resource summary
The in-person events page lets users filter by location and topic. Locations include Houston, Fort Bend, Lee, Prairie View, San Jacinto, Brazosport, Galveston, and other network centers. Topics include starting, marketing/sales, AI, social media, managing, finance/taxes, loans, procurement, legal, websites, technology, cybersecurity, food/restaurant, Spanish, international trade, and nonprofit.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the entrepreneur wants education, classes, webinars, or event-based learning. If the issue is urgent or specific to the business, pair training with SBDC advising.

## Dynamic-content warning
Class dates and webinar titles change. Provide the official link and instruct the user to filter by location/topic/format rather than relying on stale dates.
